tasks.title: Extend GwrkConfigSchema with project profile fields
tasks.description:
Add optional project profile fields (type, stack, layout, architecture, conventions) to GwrkConfigSchema in src/utils/config.ts. Tests: src/utils/config.test.ts

REVIEW FAIL (code): Schema-Implementation Mismatch — FR-032.
  WHERE: src/utils/config.ts:241-260
  EXPECTED: GwrkConfigSchema matching ProjectProfile usage in init.ts.
  ACTUAL: Schema uses objects for layout/architecture/conventions while init.ts uses strings.
  FIX: Update GwrkConfigSchema to accept strings OR objects for these fields, or update init.ts to wrap strings in objects.

tasks.title: Implement detectProfile core logic and project type detection
tasks.description:
Implement core detection logic for project type (cargo, python, pnpm, etc.) in src/engine/profile-detector.ts. Tests: src/engine/profile-detector.test.ts

REVIEW FAIL (code): Type Mismatch — FR-030.
  WHERE: src/engine/profile-detector.ts:54-68
  EXPECTED: ProjectProfile.layout should be an object (or matching schema).
  ACTUAL: ProjectProfile.layout is a string ("flat", "monorepo", etc.).
  FIX: Refactor ProjectProfile and detectProfile to return layout as an object matching GwrkConfigSchema.

tasks.title: Implement tech stack and layout extraction in detectProfile
tasks.description:
Implement extraction of language, framework, build system, and source layout in src/engine/profile-detector.ts. Tests: src/engine/profile-detector.test.ts

REVIEW FAIL (code): Type Mismatch — FR-031.
  WHERE: src/engine/profile-detector.ts:54-68
  EXPECTED: Layout extraction must produce an object for GwrkConfigSchema.
  ACTUAL: Layout is extracted as a simple classification string.
  FIX: Refactor layout extraction to produce structured object or update schema to accept classification string.

tasks.title: Refactor setup-slack.ts for internal callability
tasks.description: Refactor Slack setup logic to be easily callable from the interactive init flow. Tests: src/commands/setup-slack.test.ts

tasks.title: Implement gwrk init interactive wizard skeleton and welcome
tasks.description:
Setup interactive prompt framework in src/commands/init.ts and implement the initial welcome and detection display. Tests: src/commands/init.test.ts

REVIEW FAIL (code): Config Corruption — FR-001.
  WHERE: src/commands/init.ts:143-262
  EXPECTED: init wizard must write config that satisfies GwrkConfigSchema.
  ACTUAL: Wizard writes strings to object fields (layout, architecture, conventions), breaking subsequent commands that call loadConfig().
  FIX: Ensure wizard wraps profile strings in appropriate objects before writing .gwrkrc.json.

tasks.title: Implement profile confirmation and editing in init wizard
tasks.description:
Allow user to confirm or manually override detected profile fields (type, stack, layout) in src/commands/init.ts. Tests: src/commands/init.test.ts

REVIEW FAIL (code): Confirmation Type Mismatch — FR-032.
  WHERE: src/commands/init.ts:154-185
  EXPECTED: Overridden fields must match GwrkConfigSchema types.
  ACTUAL: User input is saved as flat strings instead of structured objects.
  FIX: Update interactive confirmation to populate objects for layout/architecture/conventions.
